highlights: Version check now fetches from API endpoint enabling real-time deployment tracking.

sections.title: Observability
items: Frontend version check now reads from /api/version.json instead of static public file.
Enables coordinated deployment detection and update notifications.

highlights: Reports can now export legacy flat revenue and deposit Excel workbooks from the shared Reports Export Center.

sections.title: Reports
items: Added Báo cáo doanh thu and Báo cáo cọc tiền as flat one-sheet Excel export choices that match the legacy sample templates.
The new exports use the shared report filters for date range, custom time range, branch, and doctor.

sections.title: Testing
items: Added backend coverage for exact workbook headers, widths, filenames, previews, filters, and row limits.
Added Reports UI coverage for the new export choices and searchable doctor filter.

highlights: Calendar Excel export now works for normal browser sessions after the Remember Me token-storage change.

sections.title: Calendar Export
items: Appointment Excel downloads now use the shared auth token source, so staff signed in with a session token can download from /calendar.
The calendar export regression test now matches the current date-range preset and appointment workbook columns.

sections.title: Testing
items: Added focused coverage proving Excel downloads send sessionStorage auth tokens.

highlights: Face ID quick scan now waits for a stronger face sample before recognition.

sections.title: Face ID
items: Quick Face ID keeps the camera open on low-quality or too-small faces instead of recognizing from weak samples.
The capture overlay now shows scanning, low quality, or face detected feedback without exposing internal auto-capture wording.

sections.title: Testing
items: Added FaceCaptureModal regression coverage for medium-quality frames, tiny detected faces, and quiet high-quality capture.

highlights: Login now supports Remember Me (60 days) and refreshes the session while you stay signed in.

sections.title: Auth
items: Added a Remember Me checkbox on the login screen to keep staff signed in for 60 days on the same device.
When Remember Me is enabled, the app refreshes the session timer while the user stays logged in.

highlights: Face ID no-match rescue now guides staff through straight, left, and right captures before saving customer samples.

sections.title: Face ID
items: Quick Face ID now asks staff to capture three face angles when recognition cannot match a customer and staff select a profile to register.
The rescue flow saves each guided pose as a separate no-match rescue sample instead of saving only the failed scan frame.

sections.title: Testing
items: Updated the Global Face ID regression test to prove no-match rescue registers three guided samples before navigating to the customer profile.

highlights: Overview Today's Services now loads real same-day treatment activity from sale order lines instead of showing the placeholder.

sections.title: Overview
items: Today's Services / Activity now fetches current-day service rows from /api/SaleOrderLines and renders service, patient, quantity, doctor, amount, and status.
The widget search is accent-insensitive across service, patient, phone/code, doctor, and order reference.

sections.title: API
items: /api/SaleOrderLines now accepts snake_case and camelCase date/location/customer filters and falls back to parent sale order fields when service-line rows are sparse.

sections.title: Testing
items: Added focused API, hook, and component tests for the Today's Services activity feed.

highlights: Calendar now paints appointment pages progressively and wraps the Day/Week/Month controls correctly on iPad widths.

sections.title: Calendar
items: Calendar appointment data now renders after each paginated API page arrives instead of waiting for the full day, week, or month range to finish loading.
Day view appointment cards now mount in batches so large same-day schedules can paint before every card is rendered.
Closed smart filters and idle search suggestions no longer recompute over the full appointment range during normal calendar viewing.

sections.title: Tablet Layout
items: Day, Week, and Month controls now use a three-column tablet-safe segmented layout.
Calendar date navigation and action controls wrap into stable rows on iPad portrait and landscape widths.

sections.title: Testing
items: Added pagination coverage proving calendar pages are reported as they arrive.
Stabilized the calendar click test around a fixed timezone date.

highlights: Payment receipt proofs can be confirmed with the new payment.confirm permission, and cash-flow summary separates confirmed vs unconfirmed money-in.

sections.title: New Features
items: Added payment.confirm permission and receipt-proof confirmation endpoint: POST /api/Payments/:id/proof/confirm.
Payment UI now lets permitted staff view receipt proofs and confirm them.

sections.title: Reports
items: Cash-flow summary response includes moneyInConfirmed and moneyInUnconfirmed; historical rows default to unconfirmed when no confirmed proof exists.

sections.title: Testing
items: Added backend route + behavior tests for receipt confirmation and extended cash-flow tests for confirmed/unconfirmed grouping.
Added frontend test ensuring confirm UI is gated by payment.confirm.

highlights: Revenue reports recognize posted treatment payments, cash-flow is mounted, payment permissions are split, and TestSprite has a task ledger.

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Revenue report paid totals now derive from posted treatment payment allocations and exclude deposits, refunds, deposit usage, and voided payments.
Cash-flow summary is available through /api/Reports/cash-flow/summary.
Ho so Online view-only users can inspect images without seeing patient-create or upload controls.

sections.title: Permissions
items: Payment creation, refund, and destructive void/delete actions now use payment.add, payment.refund, and payment.void instead of broad payment.edit.
Ho so Online patient creation and upload now use external_checkups.create and external_checkups.upload separately.

sections.title: Testing
items: ARCHITECTURE.md now defines testbright.md as the TestSprite task ledger with PASS/FAIL checklist execution.

highlights: Wait timer is timezone-safe and no longer dated from a previous day; Overview "Đang hẹn" label disambiguated from Calendar's "Đang chờ".

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Calendar/Overview wait timer no longer gets stuck at 0s when the patient was checked in on a previous day or when the browser timezone differs from the configured app timezone. Both surfaces now feed the WaitTimer the API's ISO datetimearrived/datetimeseated directly instead of round-tripping through a lossy 'HH:mm' localStorage cache.
Removed the per-appointment 'HH:mm' arrival cache that could carry yesterday's wall-clock value into today's reference date, producing a future arrival time and clamping wait to 0.

sections.title: UX
items: Right-side Today's Appointments panel now labels not-yet-arrived rows as 'Đang hẹn' / 'Scheduled' instead of 'Đang chờ' / 'Pending', removing the collision with Calendar's waiting state.
Overview now refreshes on window focus and every 60s while visible, so status changes made in another tab/window appear without a manual reload.

highlights: Customer profile now shows a Face ID badge next to gender once a face is registered

sections.title: New Features
items: Profile header displays an orange 'Face ID' pill next to the Male/Female pill when face_registered_at is set, with a tooltip showing the registration date.

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: GET /api/Partners/:id now returns face_subject_id and face_registered_at — these columns existed but were never selected, so the UI had no way to know a face was registered.

highlights: Wait timer no longer counts from a previous visit when an appointment is reactivated

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Reactivating an appointment (state → 'arrived' from done/cancelled/etc.) now resets datetimearrived, datedone, and datetimeseated. Previously, the wait timer kept counting from the prior visit's check-in (e.g. 18h+ for an appointment freshly reactivated today).

highlights: Overview wait timers use stable Vietnam arrival timestamps after check-in

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Appointment check-in timestamps now use Vietnam wall-clock time directly, preventing overview wait timers from clamping to 0s when the database session timezone is not Vietnam.
Overview wait timers now keep full persisted timestamps instead of comparing only time-of-day, so older timestamp rows do not clamp to 0s when their clock time is later than the current clock.

sections.title: Testing
items: Added backend and frontend regression coverage for appointment arrival timestamp SQL and overview wait timer elapsed-time rendering.

highlights: Calendar filter: doctor 'All' pill now shows 'Tất cả' label instead of rendering empty

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Calendar filter modal: the 'All' pill in the Bác sĩ section was rendering as an empty orange circle. Now displays 'Tất cả' (or 'All' in English), matching the styling of the Trạng thái and Nhãn màu sections.

highlights: Appointments export adds Phụ tá and Trợ lý BS columns; date range preset 3 ngày → 1 ngày

sections.title: New Features
items: Appointments Excel export now includes Phụ tá (assistant) and Trợ lý BS (dental aide) columns alongside Bác sĩ (doctor)
Export date range modal: replaced 3 ngày preset with 1 ngày for single-day exports

highlights: Customer appointment history shows start times from timestamp-only appointments
Staff selectors show a visible None option and calendar opens in Day view
fix(services): quantity input uneditable + parseFloat 0 bug in mapper

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: ServiceForm quantity input was uneditable — changed state from string to number to fix React type="number" controlled-input reconciliation
mapSaleOrderToServiceRecord: quantity 0 was incorrectly defaulting to 1 due to parseFloat("0") being falsy; fixed to proper null check

highlights: fix(calendar): default to Day view on first visit

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Calendar now opens on the Day view by default when there is no persisted state (previously defaulted to Week).

sections.title: Notes
items: 0.31.4 was bumped without a CHANGELOG entry; this 0.31.5 entry rolls that bump in along with the Calendar default-view tweak so package.json and CHANGELOG.json match the pre-commit hook check.

highlights: perf(customers): remove duplicate initial data loads

sections.title: Performance
items: Customers, employees, services, and appointments hooks no longer run the same empty-search fetch twice on first render.
The /customers list page now avoids profile-only Appointments, Employees, and SaleOrders requests until a customer profile is opened.

sections.title: Testing
items: Measured authenticated nk2 /customers load before the fix and confirmed duplicate API requests in the browser waterfall.

highlights: feat(face-id): guided customer face profile capture

sections.title: Face ID
items: Customer face registration now guides staff through straight, left, and right head positions.
Add-customer no-match capture keeps all profile samples and registers them after the customer is saved.
Existing customer Register Face now stores multiple profile samples through the existing face-register endpoint.

sections.title: Testing
items: Added targeted modal coverage for the three-step profile capture flow.
Updated customer camera widget coverage for the captured sample list passed into no-match rescue.

highlights: feat(face-id): auto-capture Face ID scan and strict match confidence

sections.title: Face ID
items: FaceCaptureModal now scans automatically after camera open and captures after several stable high-quality frames.
The privacy-blurred camera preview shows scan status, a quality bar, and a green face oval when ready.
Face matching now requires 95% confidence for automatic match and 85% confidence for the candidate dropdown, so 41% no longer passes.

sections.title: Testing
items: Expanded modal unit coverage for auto-capture and green detection feedback.
Added backend threshold coverage for 41%, 85%, and 95% Face ID confidence behavior.

highlights: i18n: replace ~30 hardcoded English/Vietnamese strings in always-visible UI with proper translation keys

sections.title: i18n
items: FormFooter (every modal): Save / Cancel / Update / Saving now read from common namespace.
DeleteConfirmDialog (every delete flow): title, message, linked-data warning, delete button now translated.
TodaySchedule (Overview/Calendar): heading + empty-state translated.
VersionDisplay (footer + bottom-right pill): Update Available, What's New translated.
FeedbackWidget (top-right on every page): list/detail title, empty state, status labels (Pending/In Progress/Resolved/Ignored), file-upload error messages now in feedback namespace.
GlobalFaceIdButton: tooltip uses customers.face.quickScan + new quickScanRecognizing key; added keyboard focus ring.
Locations page: 3 validation messages, Add Location button, loading state translated.
CustomerListView: 'Loading patients...' subtitle and table loadingMessage translated.
Payment page: 3 LoadingState titles (wallets, plans, plan details) translated.
ServiceHistory + CustomerAppointmentHistory: 10 Vietnamese table headers (Ngày/Dịch vụ/Lịch hẹn/Giờ/Ê-kíp/Trạng thái/Thành tiền/Thanh toán/Còn lại) now go through i18n.

sections.title: Locale Keys
items: common.json: confirmDelete, deleteConfirmDefault, linkedDataWarning, updateAvailable, whatsNew.
feedback.json: detailTitle, listTitle, emptyState, invalidFileType, fileTooLarge, statusLabels.{pending,inProgress,resolved,ignored}.
overview.json: todayScheduleTitle, noAppointmentsToday.
locations.json: validation.{nameRequired,addressRequired,phoneRequired}, actions.addLocation, states.{loading,loadingDescription}.
payment.json: states.{loadingWallets,loadingPlans,loadingDetails}.
customers.json: states.loading, face.{quickScan,quickScanRecognizing}.
services.json: table.{date,service,amount,paid,remaining}.
appointments.json: table.{date,appointment,time,team,status}, staff.{doctor,assistant,dentalAide}.

sections.title: Audit
items: 4 parallel audit agents found ~321 hardcoded strings across the website. This release fixes the ~30 highest-impact (always-visible / shared / form footer / delete confirm / loading state / customer detail tables); ~290 lower-priority strings remain across forms, employees, settings, permission board — captured for follow-up.

highlights: fix(face-id): privacy-blurred camera preview with mobile front/back switching

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: FaceCaptureModal now shows the live camera feed with a strong privacy blur so staff cannot see a full face in the preview.
iPhone/mobile camera startup now retries exact facingMode, ideal facingMode, then generic video access, with a front/back camera switch button.

sections.title: Testing
items: Expanded FaceCaptureModal coverage for privacy blur and front/back facingMode requests.

highlights: feat(face-id): global Face ID quick-search button in the top header

sections.title: New Features
items: Top header now has a Face ID quick-scan button next to the location filter — visible on every page through the shared Layout.

Click opens the existing FaceCaptureModal. On auto-match, navigates straight to /customers/:id; on candidate review, lists possible matches in a small popover and lets you pick; on no match, shows a brief 'No customer matched' note.
Click-outside dismisses the result popover; Escape/cancel closes the capture modal.

sections.title: Implementation
items: New component website/src/components/shared/GlobalFaceIdButton.tsx (~140 lines), hooked into Layout.tsx between FilterByLocation and FeedbackWidget.
Reuses the existing useFaceRecognition hook and recognizeFace API client — no new endpoints.

highlights: fix(calendar): speed up large week calendar loads

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Calendar week view now renders appointment cards progressively so large week ranges can paint before every card is mounted.
Calendar no-count pagination now continues past a full 3,000-row page, so large week and month ranges do not stop early.

sections.title: Testing
items: Added focused coverage for exact-full calendar pagination pages.

highlights: fix(face-id): wire embedding pipeline end-to-end so register and recognize actually work

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: face-service: SFace embeddings are now L2-normalized before being returned. Previously they were raw vectors, so cosine similarity scores were O(magnitude²) (~6.7) instead of in [-1, 1]. Combined with auto-match threshold 0.50, this caused every recognition to auto-match the closest stored face regardless of identity.

face-service: Split DETECTION_THRESHOLD into DETECTOR_SCORE_THRESHOLD (0.5, filters detector noise) and QUALITY_THRESHOLD (0.85, gates only the strongest face). Previous single-value 0.90 default rejected genuine portraits (score ~0.75) as NO_FACE.

API: Cast $1 in faceMatchEngine.registerSample so dbo.partners UPDATE no longer fails with 'COALESCE types text and uuid cannot be matched' (face_subject_id is text from the legacy Compreface migration; partner id is uuid).

sections.title: Infrastructure
items: docker-compose default FACE_DETECTION_THRESHOLD lowered from 0.90 to 0.6 (consumed as QUALITY_THRESHOLD by face-service). Override via env if you want a stricter capture gate.

sections.title: Testing
items: Added api/tests/faceRecognition.integration.test.js: a real end-to-end test that hits the live face-service and Postgres, registers two distinct faces, and asserts each recognizes back to the correct partner. This is the test that would have caught all three bugs above on run 1.

highlights: feat(face-id): local OpenCV Face ID customer search with candidate review and no-match rescue

sections.title: New Features
items: New local face-service (Python FastAPI + OpenCV YuNet + SFace) for private, on-premise face recognition.
POST /api/face/recognize now returns match, candidates, or no-match with configurable cosine similarity thresholds.
POST /api/face/register stores face embeddings in new dbo.customer_face_embeddings table and supports multiple samples per customer.
GET /api/face/status/:partnerId returns registration status and sample count.
CustomerCameraWidget now supports candidate review (staff selects from possible matches) and no-match rescue (search customer then register captured face).
All biometric data stays local; no cloud recognition APIs are called.

sections.title: Infrastructure
items: New face-service Docker container with model download at build time.
New environment variables: FACE_SERVICE_URL, FACE_AUTO_MATCH_THRESHOLD, FACE_CANDIDATE_THRESHOLD, FACE_AUTO_MATCH_MARGIN, FACE_MAX_CANDIDATES, FACE_DETECTION_THRESHOLD.
Compreface remains in compose as legacy fallback but is no longer the active engine.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: This release adds migration 046_customer_face_embeddings.sql. Run it before starting the face-service.
Thresholds should be calibrated with real clinic camera captures before relying on auto-match in production.

highlights: feat(integrations): create missing Hosoonline patients from customer profiles

sections.title: New Features
items: Customer profile health-checkup panels now show a Create HSO patient action when Hosoonline has no matching patient for the local customer.
TGClinic now proxies Hosoonline v2 patient creation through /api/ExternalCheckups/:customerCode/patient and generates HSO codes from the TDental code plus the last four phone digits.

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Hosoonline patient lookup now uses /api/patients/_search so the staff UI's cookie-routed /api/patients path remains untouched.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: This release requires HOSOONLINE_API_KEY for patient creation and keeps image reads behind the existing authenticated TGClinic proxy.

highlights: feat(reports): add employee revenue Excel export

sections.title: New Features
items: Revenue reports now support a TDental-style employee revenue Excel export with location, date, employee type, and optional employee filters.
The employee revenue export includes preview support and grouped workbook sheets for data, summary, and applied filters.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: The export uses the shared /api/Exports registry and keeps report download access behind the existing reports.export permission.

highlights: fix(integrations): prepare Hosoonline uploads in the browser

sections.title: New Features
items: Health-checkup image uploads now prepare large phone photos in the browser before submitting them to TGClinic and Hosoonline.

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: The Hosoonline upload proxy now matches the confirmed contract that only service and doctor are required fields.
The upload file picker now limits selectable files to Hosoonline-supported image types.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: Client-side preparation uses high-quality JPEG output and the backend still keeps its existing normalization fallback.

highlights: fix(integrations): stabilize Hosoonline photo uploads

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Hosoonline health-checkup uploads now normalize image files before forwarding them, reducing upstream failures from large or phone-formatted photos.
Health-checkup upload errors now show a readable message instead of raw JSON from the API.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: This keeps the existing /api/ExternalCheckups/:customerCode/health-checkups route and only changes how attached image files are prepared before sending to Hosoonline.

highlights: feat(integrations): create missing Hosoonline patients from customer profiles

sections.title: New Features
items: Customer profile health-checkup panels now show a Create HSO patient action when Hosoonline has no matching patient for the local customer.
TGClinic now proxies Hosoonline v2 patient creation through /api/ExternalCheckups/:customerCode/patient and generates HSO codes from the TDental code plus the last four phone digits.

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Hosoonline patient lookup now uses /api/patients/_search so the staff UI's cookie-routed /api/patients path remains untouched.
Direct customer profile loads preserve the loaded profile code before falling back to the paginated customer list.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: This release requires HOSOONLINE_API_KEY for patient creation and keeps image reads behind the existing authenticated TGClinic proxy.

highlights: fix(integrations): prevent Hosoonline mixed-content image blocks

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Hosoonline health-checkup image URLs now normalize http:// links to https:// before TGClinic returns them to the customer profile.
The customer health-checkup image loader also applies the same HTTPS fallback when it receives an absolute Hosoonline URL.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: This release keeps image loading behind the existing TGClinic authenticated proxy and only changes URL normalization for Hosoonline image links.

highlights: fix(customers): restore full-height iPhone customer modal

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: The customer add/edit modal now relies on the shared FormShell mobile height rules instead of overriding the sheet to 85vh on iPhone-sized screens.
Customer modal footer actions and the scrollable form body now have the full mobile viewport available, reducing cramped footer and trapped-scroll behavior.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: This is a targeted customer form follow-up to the iPhone modal release and does not change desktop modal sizing.

highlights: fix(mobile): make clinic modals iPhone-ready and widen calendar week cards

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Appointment, service, customer, and payment modals now use full-height mobile sheets with safer headers, scroll bodies, and reachable footer actions on iPhone-sized screens.
Payment and service creation layouts now stack narrow controls and amount cards so long Vietnamese labels and currency values do not squeeze or overflow on mobile.
Calendar week view on desktop now keeps appointment columns readable by showing about five days at a time with horizontal scrolling for the remaining days.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: This release keeps the existing desktop modal pattern at larger breakpoints while using mobile-first sizing below the tablet/desktop breakpoints.
Desktop calendar verification measured exactly five visible week columns in the 1440px browser viewport.

highlights: feat(overview): add sticky appointment search

sections.title: New Features
items: Overview now has a sticky top appointment search that filters the daily appointment areas underneath it and scrolls to the best matching appointment while staff type.

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: The overview search panel stays pinned above the appointment, check-in, and services panels without showing a separate dropdown menu.
The version badge and release notice now sit in the bottom-right corner as a compact toast instead of covering the left side of the workspace.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: Search matches patient name, phone, doctor, staff, appointment time, location, and notes for today's appointments.

highlights: fix(tablet): tighten appointment service and payment forms

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Appointment, service, and payment form modules now use iPad-specific spacing and grid behavior so fields stay readable without changing desktop layouts.
The payment form footer now stays visible on iPad so the submit action is not buried below the scroll.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: Desktop behavior remains on the existing large-screen breakpoints; these adjustments apply only to tablet modal sizing.

highlights: fix(domain-actions): soften appointment service and payment buttons

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Appointment quick-add, service creation, service catalog add, payment plan, deposit, and pay-now actions now use a light badge style instead of solid orange buttons.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: This keeps the domain actions visible while reducing the heavy orange visual weight across Appointments, Services, and Payments.

highlights: fix(version): soften release notice badge color

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: The inline release notice now uses a light badge-style orange background instead of a solid orange block.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: The red X dismiss button remains prominent while the banner itself is visually softer.

highlights: fix(version): make update notice easier to dismiss

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: The inline release notice now uses a solid orange background so it reads as an intentional update banner.
The dismiss action is now a prominent red X button with a larger touch target.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: Updated the floating Version Display release-notes preview shown above the version badge.

highlights: fix(tablet): adapt clinic dashboard layout for iPad

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: iPad portrait now uses the touch drawer navigation instead of the collapsed hover sidebar.
Shared page headers, tables, calendar controls, Service Catalog, and Add Customer modal layouts now wrap or stack before tablet-width content clips.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: Captured iPad portrait and landscape screenshot evidence for 36 route and popup states with zero document-level overflow flags.

highlights: fix(customers): show customer branch from API payload

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Customer list Location now falls back to the customer API company name when the location permission lookup is unavailable.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: Verified live customer searches for the May 4 customer update rows after the database deployment.

highlights: fix(permissions): make employee emails searchable on Permission Board

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Permission Board employee search now matches login email addresses.
Employee permission cards now show email addresses so admin-created accounts are easier to identify.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: The /api/Permissions/employees response now includes employeeEmail for admin search and display.

highlights: fix(payments): harden payment creation and refresh money surfaces

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Customer payment deletion now refreshes the visible service-record rows along with payment and profile totals.
The Payment page now reads canonical payment rows when the all-location view is active and refreshes after wallet top-ups.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: Payment creation now commits payment rows, allocation rows, and residual changes inside one API transaction.

highlights: fix(integrations): load Hosoonline checkup images with website auth

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Hosoonline checkup thumbnails and lightbox images now fetch protected image bytes with the current TGClinic login token before rendering.
Customer profile checkup images no longer hit the protected image proxy as anonymous browser image requests.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: Verified against the T8250 Hosoonline image path that previously returned 401 No token when loaded as a plain image URL.

highlights: fix(integrations): restore Hosoonline image pulls

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Hosoonline checkup images now use the current website login and appointment-media API when login credentials are configured.
Hosoonline image URLs are proxied through TGClinic so staff can view protected image bytes inside customer profiles.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: Keep HOSOONLINE_USERNAME and HOSOONLINE_PASSWORD configured in the API runtime; the older HOSOONLINE_API_KEY remains as a fallback for the previous contract.

highlights: fix(exports): make production export migrations deployable

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Export permission migration now works on the dbo-schema production database.
Export audit records now store employee UUIDs correctly.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: Production export downloads are unblocked after applying the export permissions and audit migrations.

highlights: fix(exports): harden Excel downloads and E2E coverage

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Calendar Excel exports now use the selected date range before the download starts.
Appointment export date cells are populated as Excel dates instead of blank values.
Service catalog price columns export as numeric currency-formatted cells.

sections.title: Release Notes
items: Added browser E2E coverage for customer, calendar, services, payment, and service catalog Excel exports.

highlights: fix(ui): unanimous toolbar button sizing and styling across all pages
fix(ui): ExportMenu dropdown positioning and z-index
refactor(exports): remove old calendar frontend export, use unified ExportMenu everywhere
fix(exports): i18n strings + audit logging
feat(exports): operational Excel exports (phases 1-3)

sections.title: New Features
items: Operational Excel exports: 5 export types (service catalog, customers, appointments, services, payments)
Centralized backend export architecture with shared XLSX builder, VND formatting, and formula injection protection
Export preview endpoint: fast COUNT-based preview with row counts, summary stats, and active filters
Permission-gated exports: each export type requires a dedicated *.export permission
Row-limit safety: hard cap at 100,000 rows per export
Export UI: dropdown menu with direct download + preview modal across ServiceCatalog, Customers, Services, Payments, and Calendar pages

highlights: chore(migration): guard service staff assignment sync

sections.title: Migration
items: Correct the service Excel migration mapping so Phụ tá writes to assistantid and Trợ lý bác sĩ writes to dentalaideid
Add duplicate employee-name detection so future service staff migrations fail loudly instead of assigning ambiguous staff

sections.title: Testing
items: Verify local migrated customer samples T0095/T0127 and service samples SO00005/SO01053/SO01564 before VPS database sync

highlights: fix(customers): include assignment fields in customer list DTO

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Return sales and CSKH assignment IDs/names from the customer list endpoint so edit-form fallback data stays complete

sections.title: Testing
items: Re-verify live customer search response includes assignment fields after deployment

highlights: refactor(customers): centralize assignment-field hydration

sections.title: Refactoring
items: Extract customer edit employee-assignment lookup logic from the oversized AddCustomerForm hook
Apply the all-employees hydration contract to both sales and CSKH assignment fields

sections.title: Testing
items: Add AddCustomerForm coverage for inactive assigned CSKH staff prefill

highlights: fix(integrations): use Hosoonline API key auth

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Send Hosoonline requests with the configured API key through the X-API-Key header instead of bearer-token authentication
Update Hosoonline error messages so staff are directed to check the API key, not rotate a token

sections.title: Testing
items: Add route-level coverage that JWT-shaped and legacy bearer-configured Hosoonline keys still use API-key header authentication

highlights: fix(customers): populate sales staff in edit form

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Pre-fill assigned Nhân viên sale inside the customer edit module, including inactive migrated employees
Allow sales-staff search options to match migrated names such as Sale Nhung when job title is blank

sections.title: Testing
items: Add AddCustomerForm coverage for inactive assigned sales staff prefill

highlights: fix(customers): show assigned sales staff on profiles

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Show the assigned Nhân viên sale from salestaffid on customer profile assignment cards
Stop using the customer's job title as the sales staff display value

sections.title: Testing
items: Add API and profile-hook coverage for customer sales staff name mapping

highlights: fix(customers): show doctor assistant before assistant

highlights: Fix edit-mode date parsing; share date normalizer across modules

Add Appointment: save failures now show an inline error banner with the server message instead of failing silently
Appointments API: relaxed Zod schema (partnerid/companyid optional at schema layer; route handler still validates required fields)

highlights: Fix Edit Service: saved customer source now pre-selected on reopen

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: CustomerProfile.tsx: added sourceId to Edit Service initialData so the source chip row correctly shows the saved selection when reopening the form.

highlights: Fix Service form: sourceId field no longer dropped during save, restore source section label

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: ServiceForm: restore empty 'Nguồn khách hàng' label — FileText icon had text stripped, now shows correctly.
sourceId relay: Customers.tsx handleCreateService and handleUpdateService intermediate types now include sourceId?, and it is passed to createServiceRecord/updateServiceRecord.
CustomerProfile.tsx onCreateService/onUpdateService prop types now include sourceId?, and both onSubmit call sites relay data.sourceId ?? null to the parent handlers.

highlights: Fix customer profile: remove bogus 'sale' chip and restore Assignments card title

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Remove treatmentstatus tag leak: partner.treatmentstatus (raw Odoo enum like 'sale', 'done') was pushed verbatim into the visible tag chips. Deleted the block so only real tags appear.
Restore empty CustomerAssignments header: kicker ('Hoạt động'), title ('Phân công'), and description ('Nhân sự phụ trách khách hàng này') were stripped during i18n migration and rendered blank.

highlights: Fix Edit Service: modal title and customer source persistence

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Edit Service modal header shows Vietnamese fallback title (Sua dich vu / Them dich vu).
Customer source persists on reload via COALESCE(so.sourceid, p.sourceid) in all SELECT queries.

highlights: Fix Service start date shifting back one day due to pg date type parsing

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Register pg type parser for OID 1082 (date) to return raw YYYY-MM-DD strings, preventing TZ-shift.

highlights: Fix i18n Batch 1 regressions: raw phase keys, empty Excel/Filter buttons, empty ChangePasswordModal

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Calendar cards no longer show raw keys like 'appointments.phase.waiting'. Stripped namespace prefix from PHASE_LABEL_KEYS values so i18next resolves them correctly to 'Đang chờ', 'Đang hẹn', 'Hoàn tất', etc.
Calendar toolbar Excel ('Xuất Excel') and Filter ('Bộ lọc') buttons render their labels again via t(key, fallback).
ChangePasswordModal no longer renders empty h2/p/label tags. Restored title, subtitle, success message, and all three field labels via t(key, fallback).

highlights: Restore 8 customer sources in Add/Edit Service forms

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Commit 78761eb7 (feat(i18n): complete EN locale translations) replaced the 8 Vietnamese customer source names in DEFAULT_CUSTOMER_SOURCES (useSettings.ts) with non-existent i18n key strings like 'settings.customerSourceDefaults.saleOnline', causing all chips to render as raw key strings and only 'Sale Online' was previously visible from an earlier regression (9a67e0cc). Restored all 8 real names: Sale Online, Khách vãng lai, Hotline, Khách cũ, Khách hàng giới thiệu, Nội bộ giới thiệu, MKT1, ĐNCB.

highlights: DepositWallet: payment method, date, and note are now persisted instead of being silently dropped

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: DepositWallet (Payment page): adding a deposit was only saving the amount — method, date, and note were silently discarded. The `onAddDeposit` callback in Payment.tsx ignored 3 of 4 parameters, and `topUpWallet` in usePayment.ts was a no-op client-side stub that only console.log'd.
Fixed `topUpWallet` to actually call `createPayment` with all fields: amount, method (vietqr mapped to bank_transfer), paymentDate, and composed notes from date + user note.
Deposit method now correctly tracked for reconciliation (cash vs bank vs VietQR).

highlights: Calendar cards now show the assistant and dental-aide alongside the doctor

sections.title: New Features
items: DayView and WeekView appointment cards display the assigned assistant and dental aide (when present) underneath the doctor, each with a Users icon — makes it obvious at a glance who's working the case.
Cards now stretch to equal height within their row/column so a staff-heavy card doesn't make siblings look stumpy.

highlights: Fixed sidebar 'Danh mục dịch vụ' link — it now opens the Service Catalog page instead of the Website CMS

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Sidebar item 'Danh mục dịch vụ' was routing to /website (Website CMS) instead of the Service Catalog page. It now points to /service-catalog, which renders the groups-sidebar + services-table view backed by the Products/ProductCategories API.
Added a dedicated /service-catalog route and wired the existing ServiceCatalog page into the router (it was never registered).
Switched the sidebar icon to FolderOpen so Service Catalog is visually distinct from its sibling 'Dịch vụ' (Stethoscope).

highlights: Appointment Add/Edit parity: staff assistant and dental aide now persist through the read path; end-time display added to Edit modal

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Edit appointment: selecting a staff assistant or dental aide now survives a reload. The save path was already correct; the read path (mapApiAppointmentToCalendar + handleAppointmentClick) was silently dropping assistantid/dentalaideid, so the modal would reinitialise to blank and the user thought the save failed.
Edit modal used an untyped cast (appointment as any).assistantid — replaced with a typed field on CalendarAppointment/OverviewAppointment.

sections.title: Improvements
items: Edit modal now shows 'Giờ kết thúc' (end time) alongside start time and duration, matching the Add form layout.
CalendarAppointment and OverviewAppointment types now carry assistantId/assistantName/dentalAideId/dentalAideName.

highlights: Excel export: wider auto-fit — min 16 chars, +4 padding for a spacious layout

sections.title: Improvements
items: Excel export: raised column min width from 10 → 16 and padding from +2 → +4 so even empty columns stay readable and content-heavy columns have breathing room.

highlights: Excel export: auto-fit column widths to content

sections.title: Improvements
items: Excel export: column widths are now auto-fit per column based on the longest cell content (+2 padding, clamped to [10, 60] chars). Replaces the hardcoded legacy TG Dental widths so headers and values are never truncated.

highlights: DayView: bucket appointments into correct 30-minute rail slots

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Calendar Day view: appointments whose start time was not on an exact 30-minute boundary (e.g. 11:51) never rendered because the slot key was the raw HH:MM instead of the 30-min rail key. Now bucketed by rounding the minute component down to 00 or 30. Surfaced after v0.19.2 day-view date-filter fix started actually returning rows.

highlights: Merge V18.2 calendar enhancements — interactive status flow, 27-slot day rail, Excel export with styled headers, day-view date-filter fix

sections.title: New Features
items: Calendar Day/Week views: interactive check-in + status flow (Đang hẹn → Chờ khám → Đang khám → Hoàn thành / Hủy hẹn)
Calendar Day view: 27-slot hourly rail (07:00–20:00) with empty-slot click-to-add
Calendar: Excel export (DanhSachLichHen_<range>.xlsx) with bold styled headers and legacy TG Dental column widths

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Calendar Day view populated zero rows because dateFrom and dateTo were sent as the same bare date (Postgres parsed both as midnight against `date <= dateTo`). Pinned dateTo to end-of-day (23:59:59) in all view modes.

highlights: Add IP Access Control with whitelist/blacklist and 4 access modes

Add CI gate in pr-checks.yml to catch --no-verify bypasses
Add release-tag.yml workflow to auto-create vX.Y.Z tags on main

highlights: Live Update Phase 1 — bulletproof update button, nginx cache fixes, telemetry groundwork.

sections.title: Runtime

Remove deprecated location.reload(true) and HEAD preflight
Await cache clearing before reload
Treat any commit-hash mismatch as update available (supports rollback detection)

Switch index.html to no-cache for cheap 304 revalidation
Remove ignored meta http-equiv cache tags from index.html

Add window.__TG_VERSION__ for console debugging

highlights: Fixed customer CRUD (add/edit) - repaired INSERT statement and auth permission middleware. Added E2E test suite for customer module.

Updated admin email from 'admin@tamdentist.vn' to 'tg@clinic.vn' for login compatibility

highlights: Fix: Tạm ứng (advance/deposit) no longer double-counts regular invoice payments

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed customer Tạm ứng balance incorrectly increasing when a regular payment invoice was created
Root cause: /api/CustomerBalance SQL counted NULL-deposit_type cash/bank payments without excluding those with allocations
Fix: added NOT EXISTS payment_allocations guard to total_deposited clause in api/src/routes/customerBalance.js
Verified: affected customer total_deposited dropped from 25,370,000đ (inflated) to 0đ (correct)

highlights: Payment history redesign: prominent date blocks, clickable cards, edit modal, colored method badges

sections.title: Improvements
items: Payment cards now lead with calendar tear-off date block (DD + MMM YYYY) for easy scanning
Each payment card is clickable to open an edit modal (EditPaymentModal)
Hover state: orange outline ring + lift animation + shadow
Method badges redesigned as colored chips: green=Cash, blue=Bank, purple=Deposit
Status badge (Posted/Voided) right-aligned, secondary to amount
Red tint for negative/refund payments
Edit modal covers: amount, method, payment date, reference code, notes
Both Payment History tab and Treatment History inline payments redesigned consistently

highlights: Fixed force update mechanism - updates now detected by commit hash, snooze instead of dismiss, critical updates auto-reload

sections.title: New Features
items: Updates detected by both semantic version AND git commit hash
24-hour snooze instead of permanent dismissal for regular updates
Critical update severity with auto-reload countdown
Cross-tab sync via BroadcastChannel
Preserves current route after update reload

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed updates not detected when only commit changed but version stayed same
Fixed permanent dismissal preventing future update notifications
Fixed grace period accepting server version without actual bundle update

highlights: Customer add/edit: live duplicate-field validation for phone & email

sections.title: New Features
items: Live uniqueness check on the phone and email fields while typing (debounced 400ms) — errors appear inline under the specific field
New backend endpoint GET /api/Partners/check-unique for field-level live validation
Save button now disabled while a duplicate is detected or a check is in flight

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Duplicate phone errors no longer appear under the Name field — they now appear under Phone with a specific Vietnamese message
PUT /api/Partners/:id now enforces duplicate phone/email checks (excluding self) — previously had none
POST /api/Partners now also checks duplicate email (case-insensitive); previously only phone was checked
API 4xx/409 responses now return a structured { error: { code, field, message } } shape; frontend throws a typed ApiError so callers can route messages to the correct field

sections.title: Infra
items: New hook useUniqueFieldCheck — debounced, cached, abort-safe live uniqueness check; reusable for future forms

New migration 021_partner_unique_constraints.sql adds UNIQUE on partners.phone and a case-insensitive UNIQUE on LOWER(email) — NOT YET APPLIED; resolve existing duplicates first (see migration comments)

highlights: Customer Profile: new Care Team strip

sections.title: New
items: Care Team shows up to 3 doctors with real roles; Lead = most visits

highlights: AddCustomerForm + POST /partners gain full Vietnamese address, identity, insurance and business-invoice fields

Tax code, business-invoice fields (unit name, unit address, personal name, personal ID card, personal tax code, personal address), and salestaff/CSKH assignments
POST /partners persists all new fields; the useCustomers hook passes them through

highlights: Appointment form smart defaults + Pay-button progress fill

sections.title: New Features
items: AppointmentForm auto-fills date/time to now when creating a new appointment
AppointmentForm auto-picks the location from the selected customer's registered branch

Pay button on Treatment History rows shows a green progress fill reflecting how much of the service is already paid

highlights: Show saleorder code badge on service rows and payment modal to distinguish duplicate service names

items: Treatment History rows display the saleorder code (SO-...) as a monospace badge

highlights: Pay-per-service refactor: locked service context, read-only location, capped multi-source inputs

sections.title: New Features
items: PaymentForm now opens with a locked service context from the invoking row
Location is rendered as a read-only badge inside the service card
Multi-source payment (wallet + cash + bank) is capped at the service residual — overpay is impossible
Submit button label always reflects the true capped total

sections.title: Removed
items: Service picker (invoice/consultation tabs, manual/auto allocation)
Location picker inside payment modal

sections.title: Testing

highlights: Security hardening: enforce permissions on all API endpoints and improve data integrity

sections.title: Security & Permissions
items: Guard all write endpoints with requirePermission middleware
Stop leaking internal error messages to API responses
Harden Docker Compose and server configuration (env vars, local port, body limit, CORS)

sections.title: Data Integrity
items: Persist employee role fields correctly across updates
Enforce payment void idempotency to prevent duplicate reversals
Allowlist foreign-key tables for safer data operations
